task: Get the women's black one-piece swimsuit, size large, with the highest discount percentage, and add it to my cart.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task. It searched sale listings sorted by Percentage Discount, verified the top 60% off black one-piece lacked size Large, then identified the highest-discount black one-piece with size Large available as Women's Colourblock Zip One Piece Black/Red at 50% off. On the product page, size L was visibly selected and in stock, and after clicking Add to cart, the page showed '1 Cart' plus an 'Added to your basket' dialog confirming 'Women's Colourblock Zip One Piece Black/Red - L' with quantity 1 and subtotal $44.00.
final_result_response:
Done. I added the Women's Colourblock Zip One Piece Black/Red in size L to your cart.

It was the highest-discount black one-piece I found with size Large available: RRP $88.00, sale $44.00, 50% off.
action_history: Opening Speedo website: const p1 = await openTab('https://us.speedo.com/');
Closing popup and opening women's one pieces: await page.locator('f7e4').click();
Opening women's one pieces category: await page.locator('e163').click();
Filtering listing to black swimsuits: await page.locator('f14e2').click().catch(e=>console.log('popup dismiss failed:'+e.message));
Opening color filter options: await page.locator('e43').click();
Applying black color filter: await page.locator('e822').click();
Opening sale quick link: await page.locator('e33').click();
Checking sort options on sale page: await page.locator('e41').click();
Sorting sale listing by highest discount: await page.locator('e1002').click();
Opening black color filter on sale page: await page.locator('e44').click();
Applying black sale filter: await page.locator('e1058').click();
Opening product type filter options: await page.locator('e38').click();
Opening top discounted black one-piece product: await page.locator('e503').click();
Adding size Large swimsuit to cart: await page.locator('e62').click();
